MOTION To Appoint Successor-In-Interest To Deceased Pltf Jose De Jesus Higareda And For Leave To File 2nd Amended Complt
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bryn C. Gallagher, of CLAPPER, PATTI, SCHWEIZER & MASON (415-332-4262), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Jose De Jesus Higareda and Rosa Higareda

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS JOSE HIGAREDA, ROSA HIGAREDA'S MOTION TO APPOINT SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO DECEASED PLAINTIFF JOSE DE JESUS HIGAREDA, AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to appoint Rosa Higareda as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff Jose De Jesus Higareda, and for leave to file second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR # 2542 = (220/HEK)
